CAMPAIGNRECORD.DropActorHint: Drop an Actor here to link it.
CAMPAIGNRECORD.DropSceneHint: Drop a Scene here to link it.
CAMPAIGNRECORD.DropItemHint: Drop an Item here to link it.

Hub.Title: Campaign Hub
Hub.NoRecords: No entries match the current filters.
Hub.OtherGroupMatches: {count} more matches in other Campaign Records — clear filters
Hub.InsertBefore: Insert a timepoint before this one
Hub.DeleteTimepointConfirmNamed: Delete the timepoint "{label}"? Attached entries stay; only the timepoint is removed.
Hub.CannotAttach: This page type cannot be attached to the timeline.
Hub.CampaignDateUnavailable: No in-world calendar is configured, so a campaign date can't be set.
Hub.CampaignDatePartial: Enter year, month, and day together, or leave all three blank.
Hub.CampaignDateBadDay: That day is outside the selected month.
Hub.CampaignDateBadTime: Enter time as HH:MM within the calendar's day.
Hub.WrongGroup: Entries can only attach to timepoints in their own Campaign Record.
Hub.CannotEditTimeline: You lack permission to edit this Campaign Record's timeline.
Hub.DropSkippedFile: "{name}" is not a supported image or video and was skipped.
Hub.DropRelayImagesOnly: "{name}" skipped — only images can be uploaded through a GM relay.
Hub.DropCannotUpload: You lack permission to upload files and no GM is connected — media can't be uploaded.
Hub.DropNoGroup: No Campaign Record can receive this media — open one in the hub or set an auto-capture target.
Hub.DropAttachFailed: "{name}" was uploaded to "{path}" but could not be attached.
Hub.DropUnattached: "{name}" was uploaded to "{path}" and left unattached.
Hub.DropNoGM: No GM is connected — "{name}" was uploaded to "{path}" but not filed to the timeline.
Hub.DropAddedToGallery: Filed "{name}" into the shared media gallery.
Hub.ShowImageToPlayersPrompt: Should players see "{name}" on the timeline? You can change this later with the eye toggle on the chip.
Hub.BrokenLink: The linked document no longer exists.
Hub.ToggleShowPlayers: Toggle player visibility of this image
Hub.RecordUnavailable: That entry can no longer be displayed.

Import.Title: Import Document
Import.SourceLocalHint: Choose a .docx file. In Google Docs use File → Download → Microsoft Word (.docx); from Word, any .docx works.
Import.ParseError: Could not read that file as a Word document.
Import.NoSections: No usable content was found in the document.
Import.ReviewHint: Review the detected sections. Choose a type for each, or skip/merge them, then create.
Import.ImagesDropped: Images could not be uploaded and were left out.
Import.ImagesNeedGM: No GM is connected and you lack file upload permission — images in this document will be skipped.
Import.ImageTypeUnsupported: Skipped an image of unsupported type "{type}".
Import.NothingToImport: Every section is set to skip — nothing to import.
Import.CreateFailed: Import failed — see the console for details.

Export.Title: Export to Word
Export.IncludeGM: Include GM content (hidden entries, GM notes)
Export.GoogleHint: To turn this into a Google Doc, drag the downloaded file into drive.google.com — it converts automatically.
Export.SelectGroup: Select a specific Campaign Record to export.
Export.HiddenRecord: This entry is hidden — check "Include GM content" to export it.
Export.Failed: Export failed — see the console for details.

InlineEditing.Name: Inline editing
InlineEditing.Hint: Edit entries directly while viewing them; changes save automatically. Turn off for read-only views.

AutoCaptureSharedMedia.Name: Auto-capture shared media
AutoCaptureSharedMedia.Hint: When a GM shows players an image or video (via Foundry's Show Players control), file it into a Shared media entry on the newest timeline point of the auto-capture target Campaign Record.

Warning.HiddenGMOnly: Only a Gamemaster can hide or reveal entries.
Warning.NoActorsToLink: There are no Actors you have permission to see.
Warning.NoScenesToLink: No scenes are available to link.
Warning.CreateGroupFailed: Failed to create the Campaign Record. See the console for details.
Warning.SchemaNewer: Campaign Record: this world's data (schema {stored}) was written by a newer module version than the one installed (schema {current}). Entries are read-only until you update the module.
Warning.ReadOnly: Campaign Record is read-only: the world's data schema is newer than the installed module.
Warning.MigrationFailed: Campaign Record: migrating world data to schema {version} failed — see the console. The migration will retry on next load.
Warning.InlineSaveFailed: Saving your change failed — see the console for details.
Warning.SceneNoImage: This scene has no image to show.

Loot.DropEncounterHint: Drop an Encounter entry here to link it.

Media.CannotPresentHidden: Hidden media cannot be presented to players.

Presenter.NoImages: This media entry has no images to present.

AutoCapture.NoGMForTarget: No GM is connected, so the auto-capture target could not be changed.
